description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: - Navigate to the "Contract" tab on Etherscan and check the `Compiler Version` field under the contract’s metadata. The version displayed must match the version specified in the `DssSpell.sol` contract (e.g., pragma solidity `0.8.16`;).
- Only the first part of the version (e.g., `v0.8.16`) needs to match; any additional commit information can be ignored.
Validators should ensure that the Solidity compiler version used in the deployed Spell matches the version specified in the `Spells-mainnet` repository on GitHub. Validators should verify this by:
tab on Etherscan and check the
field under the contract’s metadata. The version displayed must match the version specified in the `DssSpell.sol` contract (e.g., pragma solidity `0.8.16`;).
- Only the first part of the version (e.g., `v0.8.16`) needs to match; any additional commit information can be ignored.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
